scripts.build:prepare: npm run build:css && npm run build:webpack
scripts.sentry:sourcemaps: sentry-cli sourcemaps upload --org donethat --project electron --release donethat@$npm_package_version --url-prefix "~/build" --validate --wait build
scripts.dev: npm test && npm run build:prepare && electron .
scripts.dev:linux: npm test && npm run build:prepare && electron . --no-sandbox
scripts.build:win:x64: dotenv -- npm run build:prepare && dotenv -- cross-env ELECTRON_BUILDER_SIGN=true electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.build:win:arm64: dotenv -- npm run build:prepare && dotenv -- cross-env ELECTRON_BUILDER_SIGN=true electron-builder --win --arm64
scripts.upload:mac:x64: dotenv -- npm run build:prepare && npm run release:prepare && dotenv -- cross-env ELECTRON_BUILDER_SIGN=true electron-builder --mac --x64 --publish always --config.extraMetadata.main=main.js --config.publish.channel=x64
scripts.upload:mac:arm64: dotenv -- npm run build:prepare && npm run release:prepare && dotenv -- cross-env ELECTRON_BUILDER_SIGN=true electron-builder --mac --arm64 --publish always --config.extraMetadata.main=main.js --config.publish.channel=arm64
scripts.upload:win:x64: dotenv -- npm run build:prepare && npm run release:prepare && dotenv -- cross-env ELECTRON_BUILDER_SIGN=true electron-builder --win --x64 --publish always --config.extraMetadata.main=main.js --config.publish.channel=x64
scripts.upload:win:arm64: dotenv -- npm run build:prepare && npm run release:prepare && dotenv -- cross-env ELECTRON_BUILDER_SIGN=true electron-builder --win --arm64 --publish always --config.extraMetadata.main=main.js --config.publish.channel=arm64
scripts.upload:linux:x64: dotenv -- npm run build:prepare && npm run release:prepare && dotenv -- cross-env ELECTRON_BUILDER_SIGN=true electron-builder --linux --x64 --publish always --config.extraMetadata.main=main.js --config.publish.channel=x64 --config.asar=false
scripts.upload:linux:arm64: dotenv -- npm run build:prepare && npm run release:prepare && dotenv -- cross-env ELECTRON_BUILDER_SIGN=true electron-builder --linux --arm64 --publish always --config.extraMetadata.main=main.js --config.publish.channel=arm64 --config.asar=false
scripts.release: echo 'Build strategy: Run the upload:PLATFORM:ARCH command matching your current system architecture'

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: DoneThat needs microphone access to record audio for transcription and analysis.
extendInfo.NSAudioCaptureUsageDescription: DoneThat needs system audio access to capture playback audio.
